data.title: What's Going On With Treasure Global Shares Wednesday?
data.description: Treasure shares are moving higher on Wednesday after the company announced it has secured an exclusive partnership with Mezzofy.

data.title: Intermodal Strength Drives J B Hunt Transport's Q1 Beat, Says Analyst
data.description: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc (NASDAQ:JBHT) beat Q1 FY25 earnings forecasts with $1.17 EPS, driven by strong intermodal growth and lower ICS losses. Stephens analyst Justin Long reiterated an Overweight rating but trimmed the price target to $165. JBI volumes rose 7.6% year-over-year, contributing to the upside, while Final Mile and Truckload segments underperformed.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Says Tariffs Lead To 'Temporary Rise In Inflation'
Unlimited Unpacks Hedge Fund Alpha With Launch Of ETF Without High Fees, Lock-Up Features
data.description: Unlimited launches HFGM, a low-cost ETF that uses data-driven models to replicate hedge fund strategies, making them available to retail investors.
